data.title: Spot Gold Surpasses $4,140 per Ounce with Over 1% Daily Increase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, spot gold prices have surged past $4,140 per ounce, marking an increase of over 1% within the day. This significant rise highlights the ongoing fluctuations in the precious metals market.

data.title: Fidelity Digital Assets Expands Support to Solana Token
data.description: According to PANews, Fidelity Digital Assets, a subsidiary of Fidelity Investments, has announced its support for the custody and trading of Solana tokens. This development marks an expansion of the company's digital asset offerings, allowing clients to engage with Solana's growing ecosystem.

data.title: A whale with a "100% win rate" places a $16.3 million BTC long order on Hyperliquid.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address (0xc2a...4E5f2) known as the "Mysterious Whale with a 100% Win Rate" placed a buy order for 150 BTC on Hyperliquid, aiming to buy $16.3 million worth of 150 BTC at $108,700. This order can be canceled at any time.

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Regulator Plans Enhancements for Tokenized Funds
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) is set to introduce several enhancements aimed at advancing the trading of tokenized funds on virtual asset trading platforms (VATP). Cai Fengyi, the Executive Director of the SFC's Investment Products Division, announced these upcoming measures, which include the addition of payment and settlement functions on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange's fund platform.

Cai emphasized the need for more regulatory frameworks or risk prevention measures for the secondary market trading of tokenized funds. Discussions are currently underway with fund companies and relevant trading platforms to establish appropriate measures. The recent clarification that secondary market trading of tokenized funds is exempt from stamp duty is expected to facilitate progress in this area.

data.title: Binance Founder CZ Says Tokenized Gold Isn’t Truly ‘On-Chain’ — And It’s Stirring Debate
data.description:
Binance founder CZ has challenged Peter Schiff's proposal for tokenized gold, arguing it relies on trust in third parties rather than being truly on-chain, sparking a debate on digital asset security.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/binance-founder-cz-says-tokenized-gold-isnt-truly-on-chain-and-its-stirring-debate/

data.title: DePIN+RWA-driven environmental protection ecological agreement ECO Protocol is officially launched
data.description: ECO Protocol, an Ethereum-based RWA environmental protection ecosystem protocol, has officially launched, leveraging the dual innovations of DePIN and RWA to address financing challenges in the environmental protection industry. The protocol's first application focuses on oil and gas recovery, connecting the EVR 2.0, a gas liquefaction recovery unit from South Korea's ECOMAGIC, to the network. This unit, featuring patented cryogenic condensation technology, achieves zero oil and gas emissions and has been deployed in markets such as South Korea, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East. ECO Protocol is reportedly expanding into the Chinese market, providing chemical companies with hazardous gas solutions and carbon reduction data, addressing financing challenges for environmental protection companies by transforming environmental protection equipment into computing nodes to support AI computing. Using RWA technology, it tokenizes equipment and revenue, streamlining cross-border transactions and opening up new financing channels for environmental protection projects.

data.title: Propy Expands with $100 Million Investment and AI Escrow Agent
data.description:
According to Foresight News, real estate tokenization company Propy has announced a $100 million expansion plan, introducing an AI escrow agent named Agent Avery for real estate transactions. The company is acquiring title companies through a hybrid financing model that combines private credit and blockchain-based DeFi loans.

Propy is also enhancing its advisory board by appointing Chris Campbell, former Assistant Secretary of the U.S. Treasury, and Mike Jones from Science Inc. They will join Michael S. Piwowar, a former U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission member, and Michael Casey, former Chief Content Officer at CoinDesk, to guide Propy's regulatory and capital structure strategies.

data.title: INFINIT announces strategic partnership with Google
data.description: INFINIT has officially partnered with Google and Google Cloud Tech to promote the global implementation of "Agentic Finance." This collaboration will enable developers to directly integrate INFINIT's AI Agents into their financial applications, enabling intelligent collaboration and automated financial operations. INFINIT has already achieved the following in the DeFi space: 557,000+ wallets, 501,000+ DeFi sessions, and 633,000+ agent transactions. Leveraging Google Cloud's Vertex AI and the A2A protocol, INFINIT will provide a unified intelligent financial infrastructure for millions of developers worldwide. INFINIT is a comprehensive intelligent DeFi ecosystem, whose core technology is the INFINIT AI Agent infrastructure, which powers its two end-products: INFINIT Intelligence and INFINIT Strategies. The IN token is currently listed on exchanges such as Binance and Upbit.

data.description: TRM Labs data shows that cryptocurrency activity in the United States surged 50% in the first six months of 2025.

data.title: A whale deposited $3 million USDC into HyperLiquid and shorted BTC with 40x leverage.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale deposited $3 million in USDC into HyperLiquid and established a short position in BTC with 40x leverage. This whale had previously shorted BTC twice, generating a profit of $3.6 million, bringing its total profit to $8.6 million.

data.title: BNB Chain paid chat platform ReachMe has ceased operations and all services have been shut down.
data.description: The official website shows that ReachMe, the BNB Chain ecological paid chat platform, has announced the cessation of operations. All services have been permanently closed. User data has been securely processed in accordance with the privacy policy and no further transactions or messaging can be carried out.

data.title: A certain address bought $6.28 million worth of LINK at the peak before the October 11 flash crash, and sold it two weeks later at a loss of $1.096 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the address (0xCEd...837b9) purchased 293,000 LINK at an average price of $21.40 on October 11th, totaling $6.28 million. Four hours later, the price of LINK dropped to $7.90. The address sold the LINK two hours ago at an average price of $17.55, resulting in a loss of $1.096 million.
